info.title: Addepar API
info.description: Addepar is a wealth management technology platform. The API provides access to portfolio data, entities, users, files, groups, transactions, and more.

get.description: Retrieves the full list of all entities you have permission to access.

parameters.name: filter[created_before]
parameters.description: Return entities created on or before date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: filter[created_after]
parameters.description: Return entities created on or after date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: filter[modified_before]
parameters.description: Return entities modified on or before date

parameters.name: filter[modified_after]
parameters.description: Return entities modified on or after date

post.description: Adds a new entity to your firm.

patch.description: Adds, modifies, or deletes attributes of multiple existing entities.

delete.description: Deletes multiple existing entities from your firm.

get.description: Retrieves all attributes for a specific entity.

patch.description: Adds, modifies, or deletes the attributes of an existing entity.

delete.description: Deletes an existing entity from your firm.

post.description: Returns portfolio data based on the given query parameters.

get.description: Retrieves details for all users.

post.description: Creates a new user with no permissions by default.

get.description: Retrieves details for a specific user.
Retrieves details for the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Retrieves details for users matching specified emails.

post.summary: Get users by external user ID
post.description: Retrieves details for users matching specified external user IDs.

get.description: Returns the role assigned to a user.

patch.description: Assigns or removes a role for a user.

get.description: Returns the client portfolios the user has access to.
Returns the groups the user has access to.
Retrieves a list of all files and/or folders you have permission to access.

post.description: Uploads a new file to Addepar.

get.description: Retrieves details for a specific file or folder.
Downloads the content of a file.
Get file associated entities
Get file associated groups
Retrieves all groups you have access to.
Get a group
Retrieves positions (ownership relationships between entities).
Get a position

post.description: Returns transactions based on query parameters.

get.description: Retrieves audit log entries.
List all roles
Get a role
List contacts
Returns available portfolio query attributes.

basicAuth.description: HTTP Basic authentication with API key credentials
